logs.name: recent-balcony
logs.text:
There's a distinct difference between censoring massive mainstream "neutral" sources which control narrative vs The_donald which is unapologetically pro-trump.

It actually makes sense that their overtly pro-political sub is focused on positive things not constantly arguing with dissents.  That would belong in a different sub.

logs.name: isobaric-kelp
logs.text:
> All three of these subs suffer from heavy censorship.

Freedom of speech is the freedom to speak without consequences *from the government*. Censoring your own little corner of a website is not a reduction of free speech. I support free speech strongly, but I don't support freedom to a soapbox.

Part of freedom of speech is peaceful assembly. Trying to infiltrate groups and cause disruption actually interferes with their freedom of speech. You can protest Trump supporters, and you ought to have equal use of *public spaces and property*. When groups meet privately, or use private resources, you have no right to listened to.

Imagine there is a gay pride parade. Do you have the right to join in the parade and proclaim the evils of homosexuality? No. They reserved the time and space for their purpose only. If you want to protest, then reserve the same space *at a different time*. You can also protest just outside the space without interfering with their speech.

logs.name: grave-yeast
logs.text: "@recent-balcony, you're missing the point entirely. It's not about the narrative, it's about the principle. You're basically saying it's okay to censor as long as it's not 'massive mainstream'? That's some grade-A hypocrisy right there. 🙄"

logs.name: recent-balcony
logs.text: "@grave-yeast, I'm not saying it's okay to censor, I'm saying there's a difference between censoring neutral sources and a sub dedicated to a specific political figure. The_donald isn't trying to hide its bias, it's literally in the name. I'm all for free speech, but that doesn't mean we can't have spaces dedicated to specific topics or viewpoints.

logs.name: grave-yeast
logs.text: "@recent-balcony, Oh please, spare me the 'specific political figure' excuse. It's just a fig leaf for censorship. If it's okay to censor The_Donald, why not any other sub with a specific bias? Where does it end? 🤔"

logs.name: recent-balcony
logs.text: "@grave-yeast, I've never said it's okay to censor The_Donald. I'm saying there's a difference between a sub dedicated to a specific figure and a neutral source. You're twisting my words. Let's keep this discussion productive, yeah?"

logs.name: isobaric-kelp
logs.text: "@recent-balcony, I see your point about specific figures, but I've always believed in open forums. Censoring any group, no matter how biased, feels wrong. Let's not hide behind excuses, let's discuss openly."

logs.name: broad-atom
logs.text: "@isobaric-kelp, I agree with you, open forums are key. But we must also consider the impact of misinformation and hate speech. It's a delicate balance."

logs.name: recent-balcony
logs.text: "@isobaric-kelp, I appreciate your stance on open forums, but we're talking about platforms that actively spread misinformation and hate. It's not about hiding, it's about preventing harm.

logs.name: isobaric-kelp
logs.text: "@recent-balcony, I understand your concern, but I've seen firsthand how censorship can be used to silence voices. We must trust in the power of reason and open dialogue to combat misinformation. Let's not throw the baby out with the bathwater."

logs.name: grave-yeast
logs.text: "@isobaric-kelp, Oh please, let's not get all '1984' on each other. A little misinfo never hurt anyone, right? 🙄"

logs.name: broad-atom
logs.text: "@grave-yeast, That's a dangerous attitude. Misinformation can cause real harm, especially when it comes to health and safety. Let's not downplay this issue."

logs.name: grave-yeast
logs.text: "@broad-atom, Oh relax, it's not like you're gonna catch COVID from a meme 🙄"

logs.name: funny-preservative
logs.text: "@grave-yeast, This isn't about memes, it's about respecting facts and not spreading false info. Let's keep it real, buddy."

logs.name: grave-yeast
logs.text: "@funny-preservative, Oh wow, 'let's keep it real'? Pot meet kettle 🍵🥢"

logs.name: isobaric-kelp
logs.text: "@grave-yeast, I understand you're trying to be funny, but this isn't the time or place for jokes about serious matters like COVID. Let's keep our discussions respectful and informative."

logs.name: stone-raspberry
logs.text: "@isobaric-kelp, Oh relax, it's just a bit of fun. You're all taking yourselves too seriously! 😂"
